heading: Policy provisions
label: 1906 Policy provisions
text: Provisions for cash, loan, paid-up, and extended values, dividends from gains and savings, refund of unearned premiums, and such other provisions as may be found to be reasonable and practicable may be provided for in the policy of insurance from time to time by regulations promulgated by the Secretary.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83section 706 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83section 706 of this title
